title: Youtube Poop: Albuquirky Part 2
description:
Infinitely better than Part 1, I must admit. I guess there were just more opportunities in this segment.

So, comment if you want. And of course... WACKA WACKA DOO DOO YEAH!

The guitar solo was The Valedictory Elegy (Guitar Version) from the game Baten Kaitos Origins.
Link: http://bluelaguna.net/music/baten-kaitos-2-ost-soundtrack/mp3s.php

I guess the whole point I'm trying to make here is, "I... ATE... SAUERKRAUT!"

Special thanks to R. Wappin who originally made the Albuquerque animation.
